title: RobotMission
description: Validated mission plan emitted by LLM and executed by Nav2

mode.description: Mission mode: 'mapped' uses pre-built map + named waypoints, 'explore' uses SLAM + frontier exploration

mission_name.description: Human-readable mission label, e.g. 'Patrol perimeter loop'

description.description: Optional free-text summary of mission intent

loop_count.description: How many times to repeat the full waypoint sequence

return_to_start.description: If true, append the first waypoint to the end of each loop

max_speed.description: Linear speed cap in m/s — enforced by executor, not Nav2 directly

stop_on_failure.description: Abort entire mission if any single waypoint fails

explore_config.description: Configuration for explore mode (ignored in mapped mode)

max_frontiers.description: Max frontier waypoints to pursue per exploration cycle

save_map.description: Save the SLAM-generated map after exploration completes

waypoints.description: Ordered list of poses the robot must visit

x.description: X coordinate in the map frame (metres)

y.description: Y coordinate in the map frame (metres)

yaw.description: Heading in radians at this waypoint

tasks.description: Optional actions to execute upon arriving at this waypoint

action.description: Known Nav2 behaviour — only these two are allowed

then.description: In explore mode, waypoints are optional (generated by frontier explorer)

else.description: In mapped mode, waypoints are required
